hotel_description:
Azerai La Residence, Hue is a classic colonial villa spread over 656 feet on the banks of the scenic Perfume River. Offering free WiFi, it also has a tennis court, pampering spa treatments and a fitness center. Guests can enjoy meals at the in-house restaurant.

The well-appointed rooms are individually designed with beautiful Art deco furniture and spacious terraces. Enjoying views of the city or river, all come with a TV, mini-bar and private bathrooms.

Azerai La Residence, Hue is 0.9 mi from Hue Imperial Citadel. Dong Ba Market, Hue Museum of Royal Fine Arts, An Dinh Palace and Nam Giao Esplanade are within 1.2 mi away. Phu Bai Airport is accessible with a 11 mi drive.

Guests can enjoy a massage at the spa or spend quiet moments at the hotel's library. Day trips and car rentals can be arranged at the tour desk, while complimentary use of bicycles are offered for guests who wish to explore the surrounding area.

The in-house restaurant, Le Parfum Restaurant offers a colonial-style fine-dining menu.
hotel_address: 5 Le Loi Street, Hue, Vietnam

hotel_description:
Nestled beside the De Vong River and a short stroll from Cua Dai Beach is the peaceful Koi Resort & Spa Hoi An. Offering many selections of room types and villas with private pools, all rooms incorporate traditional architecture with modern facilities.

A scrumptuous breakfast buffet is served daily at Chopstix Restaurant which also stays open throughout the day featuring international menus for lunch and dinner. Specializing in coffee, cocktails, cold beers, wines and tapas, guests can relax and unwind at Moonshine Bar. hotel_description:
Cicilia Hotels & Spa Danang is a captivating blend of luxury decor and Vietnamese influences, offering a delightful stay in the vibrant city of Da Nang. Located just less than a minute's walk away from the stunning My Khe Beach, the strategic location of Cicilia Danang Hotels & Spa makes it an ideal choice for both leisure and business travelers.

The hotel features two outdoor swimming pools that provide breathtaking panoramic views of the sea, creating a serene atmosphere for unwinding and soaking up the beauty of the surroundings.

The property is ideally located within 15 minutes drive from Da Nang International airport, 2.5 miles to the city center and 2.5 miles to Han Market.

For those interested in exploring the natural wonders of the area, the renowned Marble Mountains, a cluster of limestone and marble hills, are within easy reach at around 3.1 miles away.

The hotel provides a variety of well-appointed rooms and suites suitable for single travelers, couples, triples and families. Each room is thoughtfully designed to ensure your utmost comfort and convenience throughout your stay. Featuring amenities such as a flat-screen TV, a cozy seating area, and a kettle in every room, we aim to provide you with all the essential elements for a pleasant and enjoyable experience.

Guests can approach the 24-hour front desk for currency exchange, tour arrangements and concierge services. A fitness center is available for working out. Alternatively, guests can indulge in a variety of spa treatments from Cicilia Spa.

The in-house restaurants serve up an array of Asian and continental delights.

Children Policy:
According to hotel policy and restrictedly set up in Booking.com website, 2 children under 12 years old are allowed to stay with their parents, in detail:

- The 1st child 0-4 years old stays for free if using the existing bed.
- Children 5-11 years old will be charged VND 200.000 per child per night if using the existing bed.
- Children from 12 years old and above require an extra bed with additional cost at 400,000 VND per child per night (only some rooms can place extra beds, kindly check the room description and capacity).

Please double check your reservation. In case you have not provided us with the number and age of children when you make this reservation, please pay the children surcharge at the hotel.
hotel_address: No.06-08-10 Do Ba street, T20 Beach, Ngu Hanh Son District, Danang, Vietnam

Exclusive Accommodations
Tom Hill Boutique Resort & Spa Phu Quoc features a total of 55 accommodations, including 44 hotel rooms, 10 uniquely styled villas, and 1 three-bedroom penthouse. Each space is thoughtfully designed to combine natural light, rustic materials, and serene ambiance, allowing guests to "breathe deeply, find inner calm, and restore their energy.

• Gym

• Cozy bar

• Complimentary bicycles to encourage green energy
• Resort-wide Wi-Fi
• Free shuttle service to the private beach

Tom Hill Spa
At the heart of our wellness journey, the spa blends traditional Vietnamese therapies with Eastern techniques, using local herbs and natural essential oils. The infinity pool and tranquil surroundings complete the experience of rejuvenation.

Delicate and Healthy Cuisine
Tom Hill Restaurant offers balanced cuisine: fresh island ingredients, creative vegetarian dishes, detox menus, and traditional Vietnamese flavors – all carefully crafted to nourish both body and mind.

Tom Hill Boutique Resort & Spa Phu Quoc is not just a resort, but a journey back to yourself – where every moment becomes a therapy for relaxation and renewal.

A 5-star hotel with a view of the Saigon River and Ba Son Bridge in Ho Chi Minh City's District 1

hotel_description:
An iconic landmark in the heart of Hanoi since 1901, the Metropole Hanoi has a long tradition as a luxury venue for prestigious events and as a popular rendezvous for business and leisure travelers, including famous playwrights, ambassadors, royalty, and heads of state. Blending colonial heritage with neo-classical luxury and a dash of modernity, the hotel is the first Sofitel Legend in the world and the recipient of numerous international awards for its fine service and enchanting ambiance.

Perfectly located adjacent to the bustling Old Quarter, the hotel is just 22 mi from Hanoi’s Noi Bai Airport and mere steps from many historical and cultural landmarks such as the Opera House, Hoan Kiem Lake and St. Joseph’s Cathedral.

Featuring two distinct wings – the Heritage Wing, dating back to 1901, and the neo-classical Opera Wing – the hotel exudes authenticity, history, and romance, infused with genuine luxury hospitality. Immerse yourself in a living legend, where the French art de viver is seamlessly blended with elegant Vietnamese touches that you are unlikely to experience anywhere else. Elevate your stay to new heights with Club Metropole benefits or Heritage Wing privileges, with access to 24-hour Majordome service and a curated selection of exclusive offerings for guests staying in Grand Premium rooms, Grand Luxury rooms and suites.

With six exquisite restaurants and bars, Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi offers a diverse array of culinary experiences: Le Club Bar treats guests to its signature Metropole brasserie and iconic high tea; Le Beaulieu presents contemporary French fine-dining at its finest; Spice Garden offers elevated Vietnamese cuisine; meanwhile, angelina – Hanoi’s bespoke bar-lounge-restaurant delivers a world-class beverage experience alongside imaginative comfort food; La Terrasse brings Parisian-inspired al fresco dining to the sidewalks of Hanoi; and the Bamboo Bar invites guests to unwind in a serene Indochine setting by the pool.

At this legendary hotel, guests can indulge in luxurious facilities featuring lush gardens, a tranquil heated outdoor pool, a well-equipped fitness center, and full-service meeting rooms. Rejuvenating treatments await at the enchanting Le Spa du Metropole, while curated treasures can be found at the hotel’s luxury gift shop, La Boutique, and its gourmet deli and patisserie, L’Epicerie.

A distinctive highlight is the hotel’s exclusive Path of History & Bomb Shelter Tour, where guests can uncover hidden chapters of the hotel and Hanoi’s past under the guidance of the Metropole’s resident historians. Savor quiet luxury during your stay at Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi – where heritage meets elegance, and where the stay of your dreams awaits. Step into history, embrace refined indulgence, and experience the legend for yourself
hotel_address: 15 Ngo Quyen Street, Hoan Kiem, Hanoi, Vietnam

Positioned along one of the longest beaches in Phu Quoc, Famiana Resort & Spa is set on a 2-hectare beachfront property on Truong (Long) Beach, just minutes from Duong Dong Town. Guests can enjoy a relaxed start to the day with a brunch-style breakfast served from 6:30 AM to 1:00 PM.

The resort features a private beach with white sand, shady palm trees, and beautiful sunset views, along with an outdoor swimming pool, restaurants, and a bar. Complimentary Wi-Fi is available throughout the property.

Coi Nguon Museum is located 0.6 mi away, Phu Quoc Night Market is 2.6 mi away, Su Muon Pagoda is 2 mi away, and Phu Quoc International Airport is just a 10-minute drive from the resort.

Rooms are surrounded by tropical gardens and offer a private balcony, flat-screen TV, mini-bar, and personal safe. Bathrooms include a shower or bathtub, hairdryer, and complimentary toiletries.

Del Sol Restaurant serves Phu Quoc specialties alongside Vietnamese and international favorites. Guests can also enjoy refreshing beverages on the beach or by the pool. For relaxation, the spa offers a range of treatments, while recreational facilities include kayaking, archery, pickleball, and a gym. The 24-hour reception team is available to assist with luggage storage, laundry services, and airport transfers.
hotel_address: Cua Lap Hamlet, Duong To Commune, Duong To, Phú Quốc, Vietnam
